problem id: bdcc30fe
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10110100 -> 11001100
  00100110 -> 11010111
  01001111 -> 11001110
  10011010 -> 00011110
  11011000 -> 01110111
  00101101 -> 10110011
  11110101 -> 11000100
  00110110 -> 11011101
  10100100 -> 11000110

query: 00011110
predicted answer: 11001100
